TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_Pangcah_a_tamdaw, title = O_Pangcah_a_tamdaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_Pangcah_a_tamdaw} }

S.FORM: == O Pangcah a tamdaw == 'Amis hananay sanu hulamen i, A-mi-s saan. Tatudung nuna suwal i, "ka'amis" sanay. Nawhani, iti:yaho tayni ku Holanta i pasawali mikilim tu ^kim, kamalu'an nangra i niyaru' nu puyuma; tatudung saan ku paniyaru'an nu Pangcah i saka'amis nu Puyuma, saka nanam satu maala mipangangan tuna 'Amis hananay a ngangan tahanini. Pakaynien i suwal nu 'Amis tu tireng i, "Pangcah" saan ku kananaman a pasuwal.'Amis hananay i, u sapipulita tu 'ingay nu tireng; matiya u Lidaw i ka'amis nu Fata'an ku niyaru', caay kanga'ay nu Lidaw a mituru' ku Fata'an a pasuwal u 'amis kami u timul kamu; pangangan saca tu ngangan nu niyaru', nu ngasaw, kanca u "Pangcah" sa pasuwal. Taywan Yincumin a finacadan, u Pangcah ku sa'alumanay a tamdaw, ma^den ira ku 18 a 'ufad. Na itiraay i Kalingku talatimul, pakalaelaed nu lutuk i nuetipan atu mililisay tu riyar nu sawalian, pacamul han tu itiraay i Palidaw nu Pingtong, sahtu maru'ay i dahtal, ^ca ka papina ku maru'ay i lutulutukan. wa:ta ku kakahad a masilsil ku finacadan nu Pangcah, saka adihay ku kasasiruma nu caciyaw, lusid, pinangan atu minanaman tu masamaamaanay a demak. Caay ka 'a'ida'ida ku Pangcah hananay a tamdaw, palitemek sa midimukus tu niyaru' nu hakaccaccay, ka Dipungan satu ta masasalama a mihulul tu rumaay a finacadan . 1899 a mihcaan, u Dipung a tamdaw ci Ino Kanoli mitiliday tu "Demak nu Taywan Pancing" sanay a cudad, tusil han nira mikadkad masalalima ku kasasiruma nu caciyaw nu Pangcah (1)Palidaw (2)Puyuma (3)Pakariyaray (4)Taluwadaw (5)Sakilaya. Unian ku miduyduyan nu 'alumanay a tamdaw mituur, mahapinangKahmaw tu tayalen. U tu'as nu Pangcah, pakawinaay ku pisilsil tu teluc atu misangasaway, u fafahiyan ku maru'ay tu luma'; mamikadafu ku fa'inayan, u fafahiyan ku mamicada tu dafung nu liteng, u fafahiyan saca ku malu sa'ayaway, kaikur itu a masa'usi ku fa'inayan. Lala' saho ku fafahiyan tu sarakat, matu'astu saan ku sa'usi, misakimukimur tu sapataluma'an; anu mahakakumes ho ku fa'inayan, miliyas tu luma' a mikaput tu slal i sefitu mafuti'. Itiya tu a minanam tu demak nu finawlan atu sakalatamdawaw. Makatatulu ku mihcaan patireng tu ccay selal a masakaput, mitala tu tulu mihcaan ta macakat, haen saan tahira i "mama nu kapah" ku sakakaay, tudung mamitamurung tu masamaamaanay a demak nu niyaru' atu mifacu tu likakawa nu niyaru', itini a matu'as ku falucu' nu fa'inayan, itini a mafana' tu sakingudu^ tu cimacimaan a tamdaw. Saka u tayal nu luma', mitifuk, miladum, miasik, mitangtang tu hmay, pakaen tu fafuy atu 'ayam….sahtu u fafahiyan ku dademakay. Kakafana'an samasuwalay a "Ilisin"(likuda) nu Pangcah i, u kasaslaslal nu fa'inayan ku tanengnengan; maherek ho mina'ang tu hafay ta patararikur han tu ccay fafuladan, maedeng i saka 7 tangasa i saka 9 nu fulad ku kalikudaan.Nikawrira, mapasifana' nu "Payrang' a mi 'anip ku pangcah i, u panay tu ku tanengnengan a miktun tu rumi'ad. Itiya ho, adihay ku tata'ongen nu matu'asay a kawas, nikawrira, matini sahtu u misa Kelistoay ku 'alumanay, awatu ku cikawasay malahdaw tu ku kakitaan atu kasaslal nu kapah i niyaru'. Ruma satu, matiya samihecahecaan saan ku kaluwan nu kapah atu kaying a mikihatiya a malikuda. Miharateng tu sapatirengaw tu fangcalay parur atu sakanga'ay nu 'urip nu wawa tu ikur, kakifdafda' satu tayni i tokay a misiyakay; ci'icelay i mi'aca tu luma', u cangu'utay ho i, hadidi sa a micaliw tu luma' nu tau. Nikawrira, kafaheka'an a demak i, ya caayay kalalecad ku niyaru' tu 'aya'ayaw i, sa'upu'upu saan a malafiyaw i tokay. Kakahemekan ku matiniay a kasa'upu nu mita finacadan, nika ira ku ccay a kacalemceman a demak; tayni i pisiyakayan nangra i, sahtu u nu kuwaping ku sakacacawi, anu i luma' tu mahaenay tu ku pinangan. Nengneng han ku kapah atu kaying, u mitiliday ho a kaemangay a wawa, licay han sahtu u "puctaw", ma "^tuy" ma"putuy" sanay ku caku, nucilacila satu mala "Tangafulan" itu ku tluc nu Pangcah, malahdaw ku caciyaw,caayay ku mamatira haw?
S.PHON: == o~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw == ʡamis ħananaj sano~u~u ħo~u~uɾamən i, a-mi-s saan. tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ no~u~una so~u~uwaɾ i, "kaʡamis" sanaj. nawħani, iti:jaħo~u tajni ko~u~u ħo~uɾanta i pasawaɾi mikiɾim to~u~u ʔkim, kamaɾo~u~uʡan naŋra i nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u po~u~ujo~u~uma; tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ saan ko~u~u panijaro~u~uʡan no~u~u paŋʦaħ i sakaʡamis no~u~u po~u~ujo~u~uma, saka nanam sato~u~u maaɾa mipaŋaŋan to~u~una ʡamis ħananaj a ŋaŋan taħanini. pakajniən i so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u ʡamis to~u~u tirəŋ i, "paŋʦaħ" saan ko~u~u kananaman a paso~u~uwaɾ.ʡamis ħananaj i, o~u~u sapipo~u~uɾita to~u~u ʡiŋaj no~u~u tirəŋ; matija o~u~u ɾiɬ~ɮaw i kaʡamis no~u~u fataʡan ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj no~u~u ɾiɬ~ɮaw a mito~u~uro~u~uʡ ko~u~u fataʡan a paso~u~uwaɾ o~u~u ʡamis kami o~u~u timo~u~uɾ kamo~u~u; paŋaŋan saʦa to~u~u ŋaŋan no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ, no~u~u ŋasaw, kanʦa o~u~u "paŋʦaħ" sa paso~u~uwaɾ. tajwan jinʦo~u~umin a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u~u paŋʦaħ ko~u~u saʡaɾo~u~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, maʔɬ~ɮən ira ko~u~u ** a ʡo~u~ufaɬ~ɮ. na itiraaj i kaɾiŋko~u~u taɾatimo~u~uɾ, pakaɾaəɾaəɬ~ɮ no~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk i no~u~uətipan ato~u~u miɾiɾisaj to~u~u rijar no~u~u sawaɾian, paʦamo~u~uɾ ħan to~u~u itiraaj i paɾiɬ~ɮaw no~u~u piŋto~uŋ, saħto~u~u maro~u~uʡaj i ɬ~ɮaħtaɾ, ʔʦa ka papina ko~u~u maro~u~uʡaj i ɾo~u~uto~u~uɾo~u~uto~u~ukan. wa:ta ko~u~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ a masiɾsiɾ ko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u~u paŋʦaħ, saka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u kasasiro~u~uma no~u~u ʦaʦijaw, ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ, pinaŋan ato~u~u minanaman to~u~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ʦaaj ka ʡaʡiɬ~ɮaʡiɬ~ɮa ko~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾitəmək sa miɬ~ɮimo~u~uko~u~us to~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u ħakaʦʦaʦʦaj, ka ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋan sato~u~u ta masasaɾama a miħo~u~uɾo~u~uɾ to~u~u ro~u~umaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan . **** a miħʦaan, o~u~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ino~u kano~uɾi mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u~u "ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u tajwan panʦiŋ" sanaj a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, to~u~usiɾ ħan nira mikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮ masaɾaɾima ko~u~u kasasiro~u~uma no~u~u ʦaʦijaw no~u~u paŋʦaħ (*)paɾiɬ~ɮaw (*)po~u~ujo~u~uma (*)pakarijaraj (*)taɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮaw (*)sakiɾaja. o~u~unian ko~u~u miɬ~ɮo~u~ujɬ~ɮo~u~ujan no~u~u ʡaɾo~u~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mito~u~uo~u~ur, maħapinaŋkaħmaw to~u~u tajaɾən. o~u~u to~u~uʡas no~u~u paŋʦaħ, pakawinaaj ko~u~u pisiɾsiɾ to~u~u təɾo~u~uʦ ato~u~u misaŋasawaj, o~u~u fafaħijan ko~u~u maro~u~uʡaj to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ; mamikaɬ~ɮafo~u~u ko~u~u faʡinajan, o~u~u fafaħijan ko~u~u mamiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u~u ɬ~ɮafo~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾitəŋ, o~u~u fafaħijan saʦa ko~u~u maɾo~u~u saʡajawaj, kaiko~u~ur ito~u~u a masaʡo~u~usi ko~u~u faʡinajan. ɾaɾaʡ saħo~u ko~u~u fafaħijan to~u~u sarakat, mato~u~uʡasto~u~u saan ko~u~u saʡo~u~usi, misakimo~u~ukimo~u~ur to~u~u sapataɾo~u~umaʡan; ano~u~u maħakako~u~uməs ħo~u ko~u~u faʡinajan, miɾijas to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a mikapo~u~ut to~u~u sɾaɾ i səfito~u~u mafo~u~utiʡ. itija to~u~u a minanam to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u finawɾan ato~u~u sakaɾatamɬ~ɮawaw. makatato~u~uɾo~u~u ko~u~u miħʦaan patirəŋ to~u~u ʦʦaj səɾaɾ a masakapo~u~ut, mitaɾa to~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~u miħʦaan ta maʦakat, ħaən saan taħira i "mama no~u~u kapaħ" ko~u~u sakakaaj, to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ mamitamo~u~uro~u~uŋ to~u~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ ato~u~u mifaʦo~u~u to~u~u ɾikakawa no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ, itini a mato~u~uʡas ko~u~u faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~u faʡinajan, itini a mafanaʡ to~u~u sakiŋo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uʔ to~u~u ʦimaʦimaan a tamɬ~ɮaw. saka o~u~u tajaɾ no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, mitifo~u~uk, miɾaɬ~ɮo~u~um, miasik, mitaŋtaŋ to~u~u ħmaj, pakaən to~u~u fafo~u~uj ato~u~u ʡajam*.saħto~u~u o~u~u fafaħijan ko~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj. kakafanaʡan samaso~u~uwaɾaj a "iɾisin"(ɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa) no~u~u paŋʦaħ i, o~u~u kasasɾasɾaɾ no~u~u faʡinajan ko~u~u tanəŋnəŋan; maħərək ħo~u minaʡaŋ to~u~u ħafaj ta patarariko~u~ur ħan to~u~u ʦʦaj fafo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮan, maəɬ~ɮəŋ i saka * taŋasa i saka * no~u~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kaɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮaan.nikawrira, mapasifanaʡ no~u~u "pajraŋʡ a mi ʡanip ko~u~u paŋʦaħ i, o~u~u panaj to~u~u ko~u~u tanəŋnəŋan a mikto~u~un to~u~u ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. itija ħo~u, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u tataʡo~uŋən no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj a kawas, nikawrira, matini saħto~u~u o~u~u misa kəɾisto~uaj ko~u~u ʡaɾo~u~umanaj, awato~u~u ko~u~u ʦikawasaj maɾaħɬ~ɮaw to~u~u ko~u~u kakitaan ato~u~u kasasɾaɾ no~u~u kapaħ i nijaro~u~uʡ. ro~u~uma sato~u~u, matija samiħəʦaħəʦaan saan ko~u~u kaɾo~u~uwan no~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u kajiŋ a mikiħatija a maɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa. miħaratəŋ to~u~u sapatirəŋaw to~u~u faŋʦaɾaj paro~u~ur ato~u~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u wawa to~u~u iko~u~ur, kakifɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaʡ sato~u~u tajni i to~ukaj a misijakaj; ʦiʡiʦəɾaj i miʡaʦa to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, o~u~u ʦaŋo~u~uʡo~u~utaj ħo~u i, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi sa a miʦaɾiw to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~u tao~u~u. nikawrira, kafaħəkaʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak i, ja ʦaajaj kaɾaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ to~u~u ʡajaʡajaw i, saʡo~u~upo~u~uʡo~u~upo~u~u saan a maɾafijaw i to~ukaj. kakaħəməkan ko~u~u matiniaj a kasaʡo~u~upo~u~u no~u~u mita finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ira ko~u~u ʦʦaj a kaʦaɾəmʦəman a ɬ~ɮəmak; tajni i pisijakajan naŋra i, saħto~u~u o~u~u no~u~u ko~u~uwapiŋ ko~u~u sakaʦaʦawi, ano~u~u i ɾo~u~umaʡ to~u~u maħaənaj to~u~u ko~u~u pinaŋan. nəŋnəŋ ħan ko~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u kajiŋ, o~u~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ħo~u a kaəmaŋaj a wawa, ɾiʦaj ħan saħto~u~u o~u~u "po~u~uʦtaw", ma "ʔto~u~uj" ma"po~u~uto~u~uj" sanaj ko~u~u ʦako~u~u, no~u~uʦiɾaʦiɾa sato~u~u maɾa "taŋafo~u~uɾan" ito~u~u ko~u~u tɾo~u~uʦ no~u~u paŋʦaħ, maɾaħɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u ʦaʦijaw,ʦaajaj ko~u~u mamatira ħaw?
S.FORM: == O Pangcah a tamdaw == 'Amis hananay sanu hulamen i, A-mi-s saan. Tatudung nuna suwal i, "ka'amis" sanay. Nawhani, iti:yaho tayni ku Holanta i pasawali mikilim tu ^kim, kamalu'an nangra i niyaru' nu puyuma; tatudung saan ku paniyaru'an nu Pangcah i saka'amis nu Puyuma, saka nanam satu maala mipangangan tuna 'Amis hananay a ngangan tahanini. Pakaynien i suwal nu 'Amis tu tireng i, "Pangcah" saan ku kananaman a pasuwal.'Amis hananay i, u sapipulita tu 'ingay nu tireng; matiya u Lidaw i ka'amis nu Fata'an ku niyaru', caay kanga'ay nu Lidaw a mituru' ku Fata'an a pasuwal u 'amis kami u timul kamu; pangangan saca tu ngangan nu niyaru', nu ngasaw, kanca u "Pangcah" sa pasuwal. Taywan Yincumin a finacadan, u Pangcah ku sa'alumanay a tamdaw, ma^den ira ku 18 a 'ufad. Na itiraay i Kalingku talatimul, pakalaelaed nu lutuk i nuetipan atu mililisay tu riyar nu sawalian, pacamul han tu itiraay i Palidaw nu Pingtong, sahtu maru'ay i dahtal, ^ca ka papina ku maru'ay i lutulutukan. wa:ta ku kakahad a masilsil ku finacadan nu Pangcah, saka adihay ku kasasiruma nu caciyaw, lusid, pinangan atu minanaman tu masamaamaanay a demak. Caay ka 'a'ida'ida ku Pangcah hananay a tamdaw, palitemek sa midimukus tu niyaru' nu hakaccaccay, ka Dipungan satu ta masasalama a mihulul tu rumaay a finacadan . 1899 a mihcaan, u Dipung a tamdaw ci Ino Kanoli mitiliday tu "Demak nu Taywan Pancing" sanay a cudad, tusil han nira mikadkad masalalima ku kasasiruma nu caciyaw nu Pangcah (1)Palidaw (2)Puyuma (3)Pakariyaray (4)Taluwadaw (5)Sakilaya. Unian ku miduyduyan nu 'alumanay a tamdaw mituur, mahapinangKahmaw tu tayalen. U tu'as nu Pangcah, pakawinaay ku pisilsil tu teluc atu misangasaway, u fafahiyan ku maru'ay tu luma'; mamikadafu ku fa'inayan, u fafahiyan ku mamicada tu dafung nu liteng, u fafahiyan saca ku malu sa'ayaway, kaikur itu a masa'usi ku fa'inayan. Lala' saho ku fafahiyan tu sarakat, matu'astu saan ku sa'usi, misakimukimur tu sapataluma'an; anu mahakakumes ho ku fa'inayan, miliyas tu luma' a mikaput tu slal i sefitu mafuti'. Itiya tu a minanam tu demak nu finawlan atu sakalatamdawaw. Makatatulu ku mihcaan patireng tu ccay selal a masakaput, mitala tu tulu mihcaan ta macakat, haen saan tahira i "mama nu kapah" ku sakakaay, tudung mamitamurung tu masamaamaanay a demak nu niyaru' atu mifacu tu likakawa nu niyaru', itini a matu'as ku falucu' nu fa'inayan, itini a mafana' tu sakingudu^ tu cimacimaan a tamdaw. Saka u tayal nu luma', mitifuk, miladum, miasik, mitangtang tu hmay, pakaen tu fafuy atu 'ayam….sahtu u fafahiyan ku dademakay. Kakafana'an samasuwalay a "Ilisin"(likuda) nu Pangcah i, u kasaslaslal nu fa'inayan ku tanengnengan; maherek ho mina'ang tu hafay ta patararikur han tu ccay fafuladan, maedeng i saka 7 tangasa i saka 9 nu fulad ku kalikudaan.Nikawrira, mapasifana' nu "Payrang' a mi 'anip ku pangcah i, u panay tu ku tanengnengan a miktun tu rumi'ad. Itiya ho, adihay ku tata'ongen nu matu'asay a kawas, nikawrira, matini sahtu u misa Kelistoay ku 'alumanay, awatu ku cikawasay malahdaw tu ku kakitaan atu kasaslal nu kapah i niyaru'. Ruma satu, matiya samihecahecaan saan ku kaluwan nu kapah atu kaying a mikihatiya a malikuda. Miharateng tu sapatirengaw tu fangcalay parur atu sakanga'ay nu 'urip nu wawa tu ikur, kakifdafda' satu tayni i tokay a misiyakay; ci'icelay i mi'aca tu luma', u cangu'utay ho i, hadidi sa a micaliw tu luma' nu tau. Nikawrira, kafaheka'an a demak i, ya caayay kalalecad ku niyaru' tu 'aya'ayaw i, sa'upu'upu saan a malafiyaw i tokay. Kakahemekan ku matiniay a kasa'upu nu mita finacadan, nika ira ku ccay a kacalemceman a demak; tayni i pisiyakayan nangra i, sahtu u nu kuwaping ku sakacacawi, anu i luma' tu mahaenay tu ku pinangan. Nengneng han ku kapah atu kaying, u mitiliday ho a kaemangay a wawa, licay han sahtu u "puctaw", ma "^tuy" ma"putuy" sanay ku caku, nucilacila satu mala "Tangafulan" itu ku tluc nu Pangcah, malahdaw ku caciyaw,caayay ku mamatira haw?
S.PHON: == o~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw == ʡamis ħananaj sano~u~u ħo~u~uɾamən i, a-mi-s saan. tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ no~u~una so~u~uwaɾ i, "kaʡamis" sanaj. nawħani, iti:jaħo~u tajni ko~u~u ħo~uɾanta i pasawaɾi mikiɾim to~u~u ʔkim, kamaɾo~u~uʡan naŋra i nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u po~u~ujo~u~uma; tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ saan ko~u~u panijaro~u~uʡan no~u~u paŋʦaħ i sakaʡamis no~u~u po~u~ujo~u~uma, saka nanam sato~u~u maaɾa mipaŋaŋan to~u~una ʡamis ħananaj a ŋaŋan taħanini. pakajniən i so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u ʡamis to~u~u tirəŋ i, "paŋʦaħ" saan ko~u~u kananaman a paso~u~uwaɾ.ʡamis ħananaj i, o~u~u sapipo~u~uɾita to~u~u ʡiŋaj no~u~u tirəŋ; matija o~u~u ɾiɬ~ɮaw i kaʡamis no~u~u fataʡan ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj no~u~u ɾiɬ~ɮaw a mito~u~uro~u~uʡ ko~u~u fataʡan a paso~u~uwaɾ o~u~u ʡamis kami o~u~u timo~u~uɾ kamo~u~u; paŋaŋan saʦa to~u~u ŋaŋan no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ, no~u~u ŋasaw, kanʦa o~u~u "paŋʦaħ" sa paso~u~uwaɾ. tajwan jinʦo~u~umin a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u~u paŋʦaħ ko~u~u saʡaɾo~u~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, maʔɬ~ɮən ira ko~u~u ** a ʡo~u~ufaɬ~ɮ. na itiraaj i kaɾiŋko~u~u taɾatimo~u~uɾ, pakaɾaəɾaəɬ~ɮ no~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk i no~u~uətipan ato~u~u miɾiɾisaj to~u~u rijar no~u~u sawaɾian, paʦamo~u~uɾ ħan to~u~u itiraaj i paɾiɬ~ɮaw no~u~u piŋto~uŋ, saħto~u~u maro~u~uʡaj i ɬ~ɮaħtaɾ, ʔʦa ka papina ko~u~u maro~u~uʡaj i ɾo~u~uto~u~uɾo~u~uto~u~ukan. wa:ta ko~u~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ a masiɾsiɾ ko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u~u paŋʦaħ, saka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u kasasiro~u~uma no~u~u ʦaʦijaw, ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ, pinaŋan ato~u~u minanaman to~u~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ʦaaj ka ʡaʡiɬ~ɮaʡiɬ~ɮa ko~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾitəmək sa miɬ~ɮimo~u~uko~u~us to~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u ħakaʦʦaʦʦaj, ka ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋan sato~u~u ta masasaɾama a miħo~u~uɾo~u~uɾ to~u~u ro~u~umaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan . **** a miħʦaan, o~u~u ɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ino~u kano~uɾi mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u~u "ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u tajwan panʦiŋ" sanaj a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, to~u~usiɾ ħan nira mikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮ masaɾaɾima ko~u~u kasasiro~u~uma no~u~u ʦaʦijaw no~u~u paŋʦaħ (*)paɾiɬ~ɮaw (*)po~u~ujo~u~uma (*)pakarijaraj (*)taɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮaw (*)sakiɾaja. o~u~unian ko~u~u miɬ~ɮo~u~ujɬ~ɮo~u~ujan no~u~u ʡaɾo~u~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mito~u~uo~u~ur, maħapinaŋkaħmaw to~u~u tajaɾən. o~u~u to~u~uʡas no~u~u paŋʦaħ, pakawinaaj ko~u~u pisiɾsiɾ to~u~u təɾo~u~uʦ ato~u~u misaŋasawaj, o~u~u fafaħijan ko~u~u maro~u~uʡaj to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ; mamikaɬ~ɮafo~u~u ko~u~u faʡinajan, o~u~u fafaħijan ko~u~u mamiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u~u ɬ~ɮafo~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾitəŋ, o~u~u fafaħijan saʦa ko~u~u maɾo~u~u saʡajawaj, kaiko~u~ur ito~u~u a masaʡo~u~usi ko~u~u faʡinajan. ɾaɾaʡ saħo~u ko~u~u fafaħijan to~u~u sarakat, mato~u~uʡasto~u~u saan ko~u~u saʡo~u~usi, misakimo~u~ukimo~u~ur to~u~u sapataɾo~u~umaʡan; ano~u~u maħakako~u~uməs ħo~u ko~u~u faʡinajan, miɾijas to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a mikapo~u~ut to~u~u sɾaɾ i səfito~u~u mafo~u~utiʡ. itija to~u~u a minanam to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u finawɾan ato~u~u sakaɾatamɬ~ɮawaw. makatato~u~uɾo~u~u ko~u~u miħʦaan patirəŋ to~u~u ʦʦaj səɾaɾ a masakapo~u~ut, mitaɾa to~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~u miħʦaan ta maʦakat, ħaən saan taħira i "mama no~u~u kapaħ" ko~u~u sakakaaj, to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ mamitamo~u~uro~u~uŋ to~u~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ ato~u~u mifaʦo~u~u to~u~u ɾikakawa no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ, itini a mato~u~uʡas ko~u~u faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~u faʡinajan, itini a mafanaʡ to~u~u sakiŋo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uʔ to~u~u ʦimaʦimaan a tamɬ~ɮaw. saka o~u~u tajaɾ no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, mitifo~u~uk, miɾaɬ~ɮo~u~um, miasik, mitaŋtaŋ to~u~u ħmaj, pakaən to~u~u fafo~u~uj ato~u~u ʡajam*.saħto~u~u o~u~u fafaħijan ko~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj. kakafanaʡan samaso~u~uwaɾaj a "iɾisin"(ɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa) no~u~u paŋʦaħ i, o~u~u kasasɾasɾaɾ no~u~u faʡinajan ko~u~u tanəŋnəŋan; maħərək ħo~u minaʡaŋ to~u~u ħafaj ta patarariko~u~ur ħan to~u~u ʦʦaj fafo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮan, maəɬ~ɮəŋ i saka * taŋasa i saka * no~u~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kaɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮaan.nikawrira, mapasifanaʡ no~u~u "pajraŋʡ a mi ʡanip ko~u~u paŋʦaħ i, o~u~u panaj to~u~u ko~u~u tanəŋnəŋan a mikto~u~un to~u~u ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. itija ħo~u, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u tataʡo~uŋən no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj a kawas, nikawrira, matini saħto~u~u o~u~u misa kəɾisto~uaj ko~u~u ʡaɾo~u~umanaj, awato~u~u ko~u~u ʦikawasaj maɾaħɬ~ɮaw to~u~u ko~u~u kakitaan ato~u~u kasasɾaɾ no~u~u kapaħ i nijaro~u~uʡ. ro~u~uma sato~u~u, matija samiħəʦaħəʦaan saan ko~u~u kaɾo~u~uwan no~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u kajiŋ a mikiħatija a maɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa. miħaratəŋ to~u~u sapatirəŋaw to~u~u faŋʦaɾaj paro~u~ur ato~u~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u wawa to~u~u iko~u~ur, kakifɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaʡ sato~u~u tajni i to~ukaj a misijakaj; ʦiʡiʦəɾaj i miʡaʦa to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, o~u~u ʦaŋo~u~uʡo~u~utaj ħo~u i, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi sa a miʦaɾiw to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~u tao~u~u. nikawrira, kafaħəkaʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak i, ja ʦaajaj kaɾaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ to~u~u ʡajaʡajaw i, saʡo~u~upo~u~uʡo~u~upo~u~u saan a maɾafijaw i to~ukaj. kakaħəməkan ko~u~u matiniaj a kasaʡo~u~upo~u~u no~u~u mita finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ira ko~u~u ʦʦaj a kaʦaɾəmʦəman a ɬ~ɮəmak; tajni i pisijakajan naŋra i, saħto~u~u o~u~u no~u~u ko~u~uwapiŋ ko~u~u sakaʦaʦawi, ano~u~u i ɾo~u~umaʡ to~u~u maħaənaj to~u~u ko~u~u pinaŋan. nəŋnəŋ ħan ko~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u kajiŋ, o~u~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ħo~u a kaəmaŋaj a wawa, ɾiʦaj ħan saħto~u~u o~u~u "po~u~uʦtaw", ma "ʔto~u~uj" ma"po~u~uto~u~uj" sanaj ko~u~u ʦako~u~u, no~u~uʦiɾaʦiɾa sato~u~u maɾa "taŋafo~u~uɾan" ito~u~u ko~u~u tɾo~u~uʦ no~u~u paŋʦaħ, maɾaħɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u ʦaʦijaw,ʦaajaj ko~u~u mamatira ħaw?
